message:
🐛 fix: eliminate flicker when switching tabs in single view (#104)

Instead of one shared container with DOM reparenting (innerHTML='',
appendChild) and setTimeout delays, each tab now gets its own
persistent container. Active tab shown via display:block, others
display:none. No DOM moves, no blank frames, no flicker.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
